utterances.speaker: Mona
utterances.text: Oh my God ! Oh my God ! I am so sorry !

utterances.text: Aw forget it , it is from Pier One .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: You think you can knock up my daughter and then not marry her ? ! I am gonna kill you ! !
